label: Entity Role
source: Determined by the entity's position in the whistleblowing process and its legal obligations under the Directive.

label: Entity Sector

value_descriptions.private: A legal entity in the private sector, including companies, partnerships, and other undertakings not owned or controlled by the state.
value_descriptions.public: A legal entity in the public sector, including state entities, regional and local authorities, municipalities, and other bodies governed by public law.

source: Self-declared by entity based on ownership and governance structure.

label: Entity Type

value_descriptions.company: A private legal entity (corporation, partnership, or similar) engaged in commercial activities.
value_descriptions.municipality: A local government authority with a defined population. Subject to different thresholds under Article 8(9).
value_descriptions.public_authority: A central, regional or other government authority or body governed by public law.
value_descriptions.financial_services_entity: An entity operating in financial services, anti-money laundering, or terrorist financing sectors subject to specific Union law requirements.
value_descriptions.other: Any other legal entity not falling into the above categories.

source: Determined from entity's legal form and activities.

label: Worker Count
source: Number of workers (employees) as reported by entity.

label: Municipality Population
source: Official population figure for the municipality.

label: Operates in Financial Services / AML / CTF Sector
source: Determined by whether the entity's activities fall within financial services, anti-money laundering, or counter-terrorism financing as defined by applicable Union law listed in the Annex.

label: Has Established Internal Reporting Channel
source: Verified by competent authority or through compliance documentation.

label: Internal Reporting Channel Accepts Anonymous Reports
source: Determined from the entity's reporting channel configuration and policy documentation.

label: Subject Matter of the Reported Breach

value_descriptions.public_procurement: Breaches of Union rules on public procurement, utilities procurement, defence procurement, and concession contracts. Annex Part I, point 1.
value_descriptions.financial_services: Breaches of Union rules on financial services, products and markets, including banking, insurance, securities, investment funds, payment services, and market integrity. Annex Part I, point 2.
value_descriptions.anti_money_laundering: Breaches of Union rules on prevention of money laundering and terrorist financing. Annex Part I, point 2.
value_descriptions.product_safety: Breaches of Union rules on product safety and compliance, including general product safety, medical devices, toys, cosmetics, and other regulated products. Annex Part I, point 3.
value_descriptions.transport_safety: Breaches of Union rules on transport safety, covering aviation, maritime, road, and rail transport. Annex Part I, point 4.
value_descriptions.environmental_protection: Breaches of Union rules on environmental protection, including pollution prevention, waste management, chemicals (REACH), biocides, and climate change. Annex Part I, point 5.
value_descriptions.nuclear_safety: Breaches of Union rules on nuclear safety, including radiation protection and radioactive waste management. Annex Part I, point 6.
value_descriptions.food_and_feed_safety: Breaches of Union rules on food and feed safety, hygiene, animal feed, food additives, and food labelling. Annex Part I, point 7.
value_descriptions.animal_health_and_welfare: Breaches of Union rules on animal health and welfare, including disease control, veterinary checks, and animal welfare during transport and slaughter. Annex Part I, point 7.
value_descriptions.public_health: Breaches of Union rules on public health, including cross-border health threats, medicinal products, medical devices, and tobacco products. Annex Part I, point 8.
value_descriptions.consumer_protection: Breaches of Union rules on consumer protection, including unfair commercial practices, product liability, consumer rights, and timeshare regulation. Annex Part I, point 9.
value_descriptions.data_protection_and_privacy: Breaches of Union rules on protection of privacy and personal data, including GDPR and the Law Enforcement Directive. Annex Part I, point 10.
value_descriptions.network_and_information_security: Breaches of Union rules on security of network and information systems, including the NIS Directive. Annex Part I, point 10.
value_descriptions.competition_law: Breaches of Articles 101 and 102 TFEU, State aid rules, and national competition laws. Annex Part II.
value_descriptions.corporate_taxation: Breaches or abuse of corporate tax rules and arrangements aimed at obtaining tax advantages contrary to the object or purpose of applicable corporate tax law. Annex Part II.
value_descriptions.eu_financial_interests: Breaches affecting the financial interests of the Union, including fraud, corruption, and irregularities involving EU funds. Annex Part II.
value_descriptions.internal_market: Breaches of internal market rules including Union rules on competition, State aid, corporate taxation, and digital single market. Annex Part II.
value_descriptions.other_eu_law: Any other breach of Union law not specifically listed but falling within the material scope as extended by Member States.

source: Determined from the content of the report by the reporting person or receiving person/department.
source_article: Article 2(1), Annex Parts I and II

label: Date Report Was Received
source: Recorded by the obligated entity or competent authority upon receipt of the report.

label: Receipt Acknowledgement Sent
source: Recorded in the entity's case management system.

label: Feedback Provided to Reporting Person
source: Recorded in case management system once feedback is communicated.

label: Reporting Channel Type Used

value_descriptions.internal: The reporting person has used the obligated entity's internal reporting channel to submit a report (Article 7).
value_descriptions.external: The reporting person has used the external reporting channel of a designated competent authority to submit a report (Article 10).
value_descriptions.public_disclosure: The reporting person has made information about a breach available to the public, including via media, social media, elected officials, or civil society organisations (Article 15).

source: Determined by the channel through which the report was submitted.

label: Reporting Person Had Reasonable Grounds to Believe Report Was True
source: Assessed based on the circumstances known to the reporting person at the time of the report. Good faith and reasonable belief are conditions for protection.

label: Retaliation Against Reporting Person Has Occurred
source: Determined from evidence of adverse action taken against the reporting person in a work-related context following a report.

label: Type of Retaliation

value_descriptions.dismissal: Termination of employment or the equivalent in a non-employment work relationship, directly linked to the report made by the reporting person.
value_descriptions.demotion: Reduction in position, rank, or level of seniority as a consequence of the report.
value_descriptions.salary_reduction: Reduction in salary, wages, or other financial benefits as a consequence of the report.
value_descriptions.harassment: Any hostile or unwanted conduct related to the report that has the purpose or effect of violating the dignity of the reporting person.
value_descriptions.blacklisting: Industry-wide or sector-wide informal or formal exclusion from employment, contracts or business opportunities as a consequence of the report.
value_descriptions.negative_performance_review: An unjustified negative assessment of the reporting person's performance linked to their report.
value_descriptions.denial_of_training: Refusal or failure to provide training opportunities that would otherwise have been available, linked to the report.
value_descriptions.forced_transfer: A compulsory reassignment to a different role, department, or location as a consequence of the report.
value_descriptions.contract_termination: Early termination or non-renewal of a supply, services, or goods contract as a consequence of the report.
value_descriptions.licence_revocation: Revocation, suspension or non-renewal of a permit or licence needed to carry on activities, linked to the report.
value_descriptions.damage_to_reputation: Actions that cause harm to the professional or personal reputation of the reporting person as a consequence of the report.
value_descriptions.other: Any other adverse measure or treatment not specifically listed above that is connected to the report.

source: Classified from evidence of the adverse action taken against the reporting person.

label: Confidentiality of Reporting Person's Identity Has Been Breached
source: Determined from evidence that the reporting person's identity or identifying information was disclosed without consent beyond authorised staff.

label: Date Internal Reporting Channel Was Established
source: Recorded when the entity establishes its internal reporting channel.

label: Report Was Submitted Anonymously
source: Determined from the report submission metadata.

label: Reporting Person Sought Legal Advice Before Reporting
source: Self-declared by reporting person; relevant to determining reasonableness of belief in good faith.

label: Conditions for Protected Public Disclosure Are Met
source: Assessed against Article 15 conditions: prior internal/external reporting without adequate follow-up, or imminent/manifest public interest, or risk of retaliation via external channel.
